summary: The implementation successfully delivers all four requirements with parallax scrolling, comprehensive Spider-Man content sections, depth effects throughout, and cohesive Spider-Man theming. All acceptance criteria are met with high-quality execution.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity integration with authentication hooks and providers
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or accounts' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts hooks and InternetIdentityProvider component with full authentication flow

hallucinated_features.description: Backend canister setup with actor configuration
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify backend requirements beyond non-goals. The implementation includes backend/main.mo and actor creation logic, which appears to be boilerplate rather than requested functionality
